mapper.insert: insert into tbl_post_temp (member_id, post_temp_content, post_temp_location, post_temp_tags) values (#{memberId}, #{postTempContent}, #{postTempLocation}, #{postTempTags})
mapper.select: select id, member_id, post_temp_content, post_temp_location, post_temp_tags, created_datetime, updated_datetime from tbl_post_temp where member_id = #{memberId} order by created_datetime desc
